# Session — 2026-05-09

Short debugging session. Investigated a flaky test in the Pipelines MCP suite — `test_cancel_job_returns_204` was timing out intermittently in CI.

## What happened

Traced the flake to a mock that wasn't resetting between parametrized cases. Applied `autouse=True` fixture to reset the mock state before each test. Re-ran 5 times locally; no flake.

Pushed the fix. CI green.

No new facts surfaced. Existing memory accurately reflects the project state. The 91 test count in memory is now 92 — the new test added today to cover the mock-reset path. Will update memory at next substantive session.
